items.content_html:
Buen Camino! On August 1, I'll be starting a 500-mile walk along the French Way of the Camino de Santiago.

Check back here if you'd like updates. Adieu and adios!
items.title: Camino de Santiago
items.summary: Buen Camino! On August 1, I'll be starting a 500-mile walk along the French Way of the Camino de Santiago.
